entity.label: Iddo
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Timely. The father of Ahinadab, who was one of Solomon’s purveyors (1 Kings 4:14).

nodes.label: Iddo
nodes.description: Timely. The father of Ahinadab, who was one of Solomon’s purveyors (1 Kings 4:14).

nodes.label: Ahinadab
nodes.description: Brother of liberality = liberal, one of the twelve commissariat officers appointed by Solomon in so many districts of his kingdom to raise supplies by monthly rotation for his household. He was appointed to the district of Mahanaim (1 Kings 4:14), east of Jordan.

verses.text: Ahinadab the son of Iddo had Mahanaim:
